<ultraplan>
# HarmonyForge — User Study Iterations: Refined Implementation Plan

## Context

Three user studies (`docs/iteration1.txt`, `docs/Iteration2.txt`, `docs/Iteration3.txt`) identified a set of product gaps. The draft plan referenced `iteration4.txt` and `iteration5.txt`, which do not exist in the repo; all items below are grounded in the three actual study documents.

A cross-reference against the current frontend revealed that several items in the draft plan are **already implemented**:

| Draft item | Status |
|---|---|
| 1.1 Tenor clef | ✅ Done — `satbToMusicXML.ts:461` returns `{sign:"G",line:2,octaveChange:-1}` for Tenor, with Iter1 citation in comment |
| 1.3 Rhythmic monotony | ✅ Done — `slotSpansForDensity()` implements all three density modes |
| 2.1 Hit detection (stems vs. noteheads) | ✅ Done — CSS `pointer-events:none` on SVG `<line>` in `RiffScoreEditor.tsx:756` |
| 2.2 Grab cursor on notes | ✅ Done — CSS `.riff-ScoreCanvas { cursor: grab }` in `RiffScoreEditor.tsx:742` |
| 3.2 RhythmDensity plain-language hints | ✅ Done — `RHYTHM_DENSITY_LABELS` + `title` on buttons + HoverTooltip on "Harmony motion" label |
| 4.1 Response conciseness | ✅ Done — `CITATION_AND_BREVITY` in `prompts.ts:87` mandates 3–5 bullets / ≤4 sentences |

The plan below addresses only genuine gaps.

---

## Dependency diagram

```
StepBar label rename ──────────────────────────────────────────────┐
                                                                   ▼
CoachmarkOverlay step-2 body update (must stay in sync with rename)

QuickReplyChips DEFAULT_CHIPS swap  (standalone, no deps)

EnsembleBuilderPanel: reset button  (standalone, reset() already in store)

EnsembleBuilderPanel: instrument descriptions
  └─► VoiceDropdown: accept optional descriptions map (interface extension)

TheoryInspectorStore: add explanationLevel field
  └─► useTheoryInspector hook: read from store instead of DEFAULT_EXPLANATION_LEVEL
        └─► TheoryInspectorPanel: show 3-button level selector in header
```

---

## Group 1 — Theory Inspector Quick Wins (Priority: High)

### 1.1 QuickReplyChips — Remove Technical Defaults

**Problem (Iter1 §3):** "I just don't know what question to ask." Default chips include "Schenker analysis" and "Why parallel 5th?" — both too technical for non-specialist users.

**File:** `frontend/src/components/molecules/QuickReplyChips.tsx:10–15`

**Change:** Replace `DEFAULT_CHIPS`:
```ts
const DEFAULT_CHIPS = [
  "Does this sound good together?",
  "Why did you pick this note?",
  "What would sound better here?",
  "Check my voice leading",
];
```

### 1.2 Expose Explanation Level Selector

**Problem (Iter2 §1):** "Avoid assuming classical notation literacy" — but the app hardcodes `DEFAULT_EXPLANATION_LEVEL` ("intermediate") in every `useTheoryInspector` hook call (`hooks/useTheoryInspector.ts:992,1204,1343`). The `ExplanationLevel` type, `explanationLevel.ts`, and the API route field are all implemented; only the UI binding is missing.

**Files:**
- `frontend/src/store/useTheoryInspectorStore.ts`
- `frontend/src/hooks/useTheoryInspector.ts`
- `frontend/src/components/organisms/TheoryInspectorPanel.tsx`

**Changes:**
1. Add to `TheoryInspectorState` interface (after `showInspectorRationale`):
   ```ts
   explanationLevel: ExplanationLevel;
   setExplanationLevel: (level: ExplanationLevel) => void;
   ```

## Group 2 — Navigation & Configuration Clarity (Priority: High)

**Problem (Iter2 §1):** Users can't find the configuration screen because "Document" is a non-actionable noun. "Arrange" describes what the user does on that screen.

**File:** `frontend/src/components/organisms/CoachmarkOverlay.tsx:47–49`

The arrangement engine reads this configuration."` Update to: `"Choose mood, backing density, and instruments for your arrangement. The engine uses these settings to build the harmony."` (Matches the EnsembleBuilderPanel's own subtitle and avoids redundant voice/part language.)

```text
1	export type ExplanationLevel = "beginner" | "intermediate" | "professional";
2	
3	const LEVELS = ["beginner", "intermediate", "professional"] as const satisfies readonly ExplanationLevel[];
4	
5	export function isExplanationLevel(v: unknown): v is ExplanationLevel {
6	  return typeof v === "string" && (LEVELS as readonly string[]).includes(v);
7	}
8	
9	/** Audience depth when the client omits or sends an invalid level. */
10	export const DEFAULT_EXPLANATION_LEVEL: ExplanationLevel = "intermediate";
11	
12	export function resolveExplanationLevel(v: unknown): ExplanationLevel {
13	  return isExplanationLevel(v) ? v : DEFAULT_EXPLANATION_LEVEL;
14	}
15
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
144	export const useTheoryInspectorStore = create<TheoryInspectorState>(
145	  (set) => ({
146	    messages: [],
147	    addMessage: (msg) =>
148	      set((s) => ({ messages: [...s.messages, msg] })),
149	    updateMessage: (id, patch) =>
150	      set((s) => ({
151	        messages: s.messages.map((m) =>
152	          m.id === id ? { ...m, ...patch } : m,
153	        ),
154	      })),
155	    clearMessages: () => set({ messages: [] }),
156	
157	    persona: "tutor",
158	    setPersona: (persona) => set({ persona }),
159	
160	    genre: "classical",
161	    setGenre: (genre) => set({ genre }),
162	
163	    isStreaming: false,
164	    setIsStreaming: (isStreaming) => set({ isStreaming }),
165	    streamingMessageId: null,
166	    setStreamingMessageId: (streamingMessageId) => set({ streamingMessageId }),
167	
168	    lastValidation: null,
169	    setLastValidation: (lastValidation) => set({ lastValidation }),
170	
171	    inputValue: "",
172	    setInputValue: (inputValue) => set({ inputValue }),
173	
174	    hasApiKey: false,
175	    setHasApiKey: (hasApiKey) => set({ hasApiKey }),
176	
177	    musicalGoal: "",
178	    setMusicalGoal: (musicalGoal) => set({ musicalGoal }),
179	
180	    showInspectorRationale: false,
181	    setShowInspectorRationale: (showInspectorRationale) => set({ showInspectorRationale }),
182	
183	    issueHighlights: [],
184	    setIssueHighlights: (issueHighlights) => set({ issueHighlights }),
185	    clearIssueHighlights: () => set({ issueHighlights: [] }),
186	
187	    selectedNoteInsight: null,
188	    setSelectedNoteInsight: (insight) =>
189	      set((s) => {
190	        if (insight) {
191	          return {
192	            selectedNoteInsight: insight,
193	            inspectorScoreFocus: { kind: "note", insight },
194	          };
195	        }
196	        return {
197	          selectedNoteInsight: null,
198	          inspectorScoreFocus:
199	            s.inspectorScoreFocus?.kind === "note" ? null : s.inspectorScoreFocus,
200	        };
201	      }),
202	
203	    patchSelectedNoteInsight: (patch) =>
204	      set((s) => {
205	        const cur = s.selectedNoteInsight;
206	        if (!cur) return s;
207	        const next = { ...cur, ...patch };
208	        return {
209	          selectedNoteInsight: next,
210	          inspectorScoreFocus:
211	            s.inspectorScoreFocus?.kind === "note"
212	              ? { kind: "note", insight: next }
213	              : s.inspectorScoreFocus,
214	        };
215	      }),
216	
217	    inspectorScoreFocus: null,
218	    setInspectorScoreFocus: (focus) =>
219	      set({
220	        inspectorScoreFocus: focus,
221	        selectedNoteInsight: focus?.kind === "note" ? focus.insight : null,
222	      }),
223	
224	    generationBaselineHarmonyPitches: {},
225	    generationBaselineSatbTrace: null,
226	    generationBaselineAuditedSlots: null,
227	    setGenerationBaseline: (payload) =>
228	      set({
229	        generationBaselineHarmonyPitches: payload.harmonyNotePitches,
230	        generationBaselineSatbTrace: payload.satbTrace,
231	        generationBaselineAuditedSlots: payload.baselineAuditedSlots,
232	      }),
233	    clearGenerationBaseline: () =>
234	      set({
235	        generationBaselineHarmonyPitches: {},
236	        generationBaselineSatbTrace: null,
237	        generationBaselineAuditedSlots: null,
238	      }),
239	  }),
240	);
```

```text
87	export interface SmuflIconProps extends React.SVGProps<SVGSVGElement> {
88	  name: string;
89	}
90	
91	export const SmuflIcon = React.forwardRef<SVGSVGElement, SmuflIconProps>(
92	  ({ name, className, ...props }, ref) => {
93	    const icon = SMUFL_PATHS[name];
94	    if (!icon) return null;
95	
96	    return (
97	      <svg
98	        ref={ref}
99	        viewBox={icon.viewBox}
100	        fill="currentColor"
101	        className={cn("w-full h-full", className)}
102	        {...props}
103	      >
104	        <path d={icon.path} />
105	      </svg>
106	    );
107	  },
108	);
```

     ```ts
     import { Mic, Wind, Bell, Music, Music2 } from "lucide-react";
     import type { LucideIcon } from "lucide-react";

     function getInstrumentIcon(name: string): LucideIcon {
       const n = name.toLowerCase();
       if (/\b(flute|oboe|clarinet|bassoon|saxophone|sax|piccolo|recorder)\b/.test(n)) return Wind;
       if (/\b(trumpet|horn|trombone|tuba|cornet|bugle|flugelhorn)\b/.test(n)) return Bell;
       if (/\b(violin|viola|cello|string|guitar|harp|double bass|contrabass|lute)\b/.test(n)) return Music2;
       if (/\b(voice|vocal|singer|soprano|alto|tenor|baritone|mezzo)\b/.test(n) || n.endsWith(" voice")) return Mic;
       return Music;
     }
     ```

```text
40	/** Map an instrument name to a recognisable Lucide icon by family. */
41	function getInstrumentIcon(name: string): LucideIcon {
42	  const n = name.toLowerCase();
43	  if (/\b(flute|oboe|clarinet|bassoon|saxophone|sax|piccolo|recorder)\b/.test(n)) return Wind;
44	  if (/\b(trumpet|horn|trombone|tuba|cornet|bugle|flugelhorn)\b/.test(n)) return Bell;
45	  if (/\b(violin|viola|cello|string|guitar|harp|double bass|contrabass|lute)\b/.test(n)) return Music2;
46	  if (/\b(voice|vocal|singer|soprano|alto|tenor|baritone|mezzo)\b/.test(n) || n.endsWith(" voice")) return Mic;
47	  return Music;
48	}
49	
50	// Dynamic import — RiffScore manipulates DOM/SVG and cannot SSR
51	const RiffScoreComponent = dynamic(
52	  () => import("riffscore").then((mod) => mod.RiffScore),
53	  { ssr: false },
54	);
```

```text
183	  const toggleSelectedRests = () => {
184	    if (!score || !hasSelection) return;
185	    const next = cloneScore(score);
186	    for (const part of next.parts) {
187	      for (const measure of part.measures) {
188	        for (const note of measure.notes) {
189	          if (!selectedNoteIds.has(note.id)) continue;
190	          note.isRest = !note.isRest;
191	          if (note.isRest) note.pitch = "B4";
192	          else if (!note.pitch.match(/^[A-G](#|b)?\d+$/)) note.pitch = "C4";
193	        }
194	      }
195	    }
196	    applyScore(next);
197	  };
```

```text
667	        if (parsed.toolId) onPaletteSymbolDrop(parsed.toolId);
668	      } catch {
669	        /* ignore malformed drop payload */
670	      }
671	    },
672	    [onPaletteSymbolDrop],
673	  );
674	
675	  if (!score || !config) return null;
676	
677	  const selectedIds = new Set(selection.map((s) => s.noteId));
678	
679	  const chordUiOn = Boolean(score && shouldShowChordNotation(score));
680	
681	  return (
682	    <div
683	      ref={containerRef}
684	      className={cn(
685	        "relative w-full h-full min-h-[200px] riffscore-hf-wrapper",
686	        showNoteNameLabels && (!presentation || allowNoteNameLabelsInPresentation) && "pt-5",
687	        className,
688	      )}
689	      data-hf-chord-ui={chordUiOn ? "1" : "0"}
```

_**Agent (claude-sonnet-4-6 2026-04-23 00:12:42Z)**_

Clean. The implementation:

- `ArrowUp` / `ArrowDown` → ±1 semitone; `Shift+ArrowUp` / `Shift+ArrowDown` → ±12 (octave)
- `preventDefault()` suppresses page scroll when notes are selected
- No-ops when nothing is selected — arrow keys pass through normally for scrolling
- `tabIndex={0}` makes the wrapper focusable so key events land on it without needing a separate focus target
- Coachmark step 3 now reads: *"…or press ↑↓ to move by semitone (Shift+↑↓ for an octave)."*

All 6 gaps from the audit plan are now shipped, Superman.

```text
+  const handleKeyDown = useCallback(
+    (e: React.KeyboardEvent<HTMLDivElement>) => {
+      if (!hasSelection) return;
+      if (e.key !== "ArrowUp" && e.key !== "ArrowDown") return;
+      e.preventDefault();
+      const semitones = e.key === "ArrowUp"

+        : (e.shiftKey ? -12 : -1);
```
